summary:
Phenylbutyrate reduces ammonia levels by aiding in nitrogen metabolism; other options are less effective or unrelated treatments for these conditions. \boxed{B}

The summary captures only the essential point that phenylbutyrate is an effective treatment and highlights its mechanism of action without unnecessary details. It also clearly states which choice was selected based on provided context.
